zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Alcock於1563年出生在英國奧可福爾班波瑞時，他的父親Alexander Alcock23歲，母親Dorothy Pomeroy18歲。他於1588年5月18日與Ellen Tredwell在英國奧可福爾艾普維爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1601年在英國英格蘭奧可福爾班波瑞享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Alcock于1563年出生在英国奧可福爾班波瑞时，他的父亲Alexander Alcock23岁，母亲Dorothy Pomeroy18岁。他于1588年5月18日与Ellen Tredwell在英国奧可福爾艾普維爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1601年在英国英格兰奧可福爾班波瑞享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: Alcock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Alcok, a pet form of any of the many medieval personal names beginning with Al-, especially Alan and Alexander. The Middle English hypocoristic suffix -cok (see Cocke ) was very commonly added to personal names in Middle English: compare for example Hancock and Wilcock .

variants.name: Cocke
meanings: nickname from Middle English cok (Old English and Old French coc) ‘rooster’.
patronymic from the Old French and Middle English personal name Cok, of uncertain origin but perhaps derived from the word in 1 above.

variants.name: Alcott
meanings: English: ostensibly a topographic name from any of a large number of places called in Old English as ‘the old cottage’ (Old English (e)ald + cot(e)). In fact, however, it is generally an altered form of Alcock , in part at least for euphemistic reasons.

History: Louisa May Alcott (1832–88), author of Little Women (1869), was the daughter of Amos Bronson Alcott (1799–1888), who had changed the surname from Alcox. The family trace their descent from an Alcocke family who emigrated from England to MA with John Winthrop (see Winthrop ) in 1630.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Alcock was born in 1563, in Banbury, Oxfordshire, England, his father, Alexander Alcock, was 23 and his mother, Dorothy Pomeroy, was 18. He married Ellen Tredwell on 18 May 1588, in Epwell, Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died in 1601, in Banbury, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Alcock est né en 1563, à Banbury, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Alexander Alcock, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Dorothy Pomeroy, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Ellen Tredwell le 18 mai 1588, à Epwell, Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1601, à Banbury, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Alcock 1563 in Banbury, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alexander Alcock 23 und seine Mutter Dorothy Pomeroy 18. Er hat am 18. Mai 1588 in Epwell, Oxfordshire, England Ellen Tredwell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1601 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Banbury, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Alcock è nato il nel 1563 nel Banbury, Oxfordshire, England, il suo padre, Alexander Alcock, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Dorothy Pomeroy, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Ellen Tredwell il 18 maggio 1588, nel Epwell, Oxfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1601, nel Banbury, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 38 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Alcock(이)가 1563년 영국 스퍼드실르 반버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alexander Alcock(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Dorothy Pomeroy(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1588년 5월 18일 영국 스퍼드실르 프웰에서 Ellen Tredwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1601년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 반버이에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Alcock родился в 1563 г. в местности банбури, оксфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Alexander Alcock было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Dorothy Pomeroy, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellen Tredwell 18 мая 1588 г. в местности эпвелл, оксфордшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1601 г. в местности банбури, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 38 лет.
